Project.NAME: video-slide-md
Project.keywords: video, slides, markdown, presentation, open-cv, computer-vision, slide-detection, subtitle-alignment
Project.annotation: Automatically extract slide intervals from educational videos, link to SRT/VTT subtitles, and export Markdown presentations.

M-MODELS.NAME: Models
M-MODELS.purpose: Pydantic data models for slides document

type-SlidesDocument.PURPOSE: Root document containing all slide segments

type-SlideSegment.PURPOSE: Single slide interval with transcript and metadata

type-SubtitleCue.PURPOSE: Single subtitle entry with time and text

M-CLI.NAME: CLI
M-CLI.purpose: Typer CLI entry point for detect, export-md, debug, review commands

fn-detect.PURPOSE: Main detect command: video + subtitles -> slides.json + images

fn-export-md.PURPOSE: Export slides.json to Marp Markdown presentation

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Configuration loading — YAML file + CLI arg merge

M-VIDEO-DECODE.NAME: VideoDecode
M-VIDEO-DECODE.purpose: Video frame decoding and sampling at given fps with multi-backend support

M-BACKENDS.NAME: Backends
M-BACKENDS.purpose: Video decoder backends: OpenCV, PyAV, Decord, NVDEC

M-BACKEND-PYAV.NAME: PyAVBackend
M-BACKEND-PYAV.purpose: PyAV/FFmpeg decoder with CUDA NVDEC hwaccel

M-ROI.NAME: ROI
M-ROI.purpose: Slide ROI management — crop and mask ignore regions

M-FRAME-FEATURES.NAME: FrameFeatures
M-FRAME-FEATURES.purpose: Frame feature extraction: pHash, dHash, histogram, grayscale, visual distance

M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.NAME: SlideDetector
M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.purpose: Slide change detection via frame comparison with threshold and debounce

M-SEGMENTER.NAME: Segmenter
M-SEGMENTER.purpose: Convert change events to slide intervals with representative timestamps

M-DEDUPE.NAME: Dedupe
M-DEDUPE.purpose: Deduplicate adjacent slide segments via hash/SSIM similarity

M-SUBTITLES.NAME: Subtitles
M-SUBTITLES.purpose: SRT/VTT parsing and alignment of cues to slide intervals

M-PPTX-EXPORT.NAME: PptxExport
M-PPTX-EXPORT.purpose: Export slides.json to PPTX presentation with slide images and speaker notes

fn-export_to_pptx.PURPOSE: Write .pptx with slide images as full-slide pictures and speaker notes

M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.NAME: NotesProcessor
M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.purpose: Process raw subtitle transcript into clean speaker notes for PPTX export

fn-process_notes.PURPOSE: Main entry: raw text + cues → clean speaker notes

fn-SYSTEM_PROMPT_REPHRASE.PURPOSE: System prompt template for LLM-based rephrasing

M-DEBUG-EXPORT.NAME: DebugExport
M-DEBUG-EXPORT.purpose: Generate debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg

M-PIPELINE.NAME: PipelineOrchestrator
M-PIPELINE.purpose: Wire all modules together in CLI detect/export-md/debug commands

CrossLink.relation: configures notes_mode and passes to export

M-LLM-CLIENT.NAME: LlmClient
M-LLM-CLIENT.purpose: Generic LLM client abstraction over OpenAI-compatible API (LM Studio) with vision support and model lifecycle management

fn-chat.PURPOSE: Send chat completion request to LLM

fn-vision.PURPOSE: Send image + prompt for vision analysis

fn-load_model.PURPOSE: Load model via LM Studio API

M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.NAME: SlideAnalyzer
M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.purpose: Analyze slide screenshot via LLM vision — extract visual description and on-screen text terms

fn-analyze_slide.PURPOSE: Analyze single slide image → structured description

fn-VISION_SYSTEM_PROMPT.PURPOSE: System prompt for slide vision analysis

M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.NAME: LlmOrchestrator
M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.purpose: Coordinate full LLM processing pipeline: load model, analyze all slides, rephrase transcript, unload model, save enriched slides.json

fn-run_llm_pipeline.PURPOSE: Main entry: slides.json path → enriched slides.json

M-COLAB.NAME: ColabDeployment
M-COLAB.purpose: Google Colab notebook for running the pipeline with free T4 GPU

fn-colab-setup.PURPOSE: Install deps, mount Drive, configure environment
